summary: Iteration 3 PO close-out complete. PR #15 (Tracking + SOS + Mapbox migration) approved by tech lead 2026-05-15T07:00:00Z, pending human merge. 7 user stories delivered (US-3-0 through US-3-10, excluding T-3-9 route rendering deferred to backlog). All quality gates passed: dart analyze 0 errors/0 warnings, flutter test 47 pass (1 pre-existing failure), zero google_maps_flutter/geocoding imports, 30+ l10n keys added, Clean Architecture enforced. Iteration 3 marked done in workflow/state.json. Bridge document created for iter-4 planning (social follow system + deep link domain provisioning).

notes: PR #15 is APPROVED but NOT MERGED. Mark in all summary documents as 'in review, pending human merge'. Tech lead approval timestamps: initial review BLOCKED (2026-05-15T06:00:00Z, 6 violations), re-review APPROVED (2026-05-15T07:00:00Z, all violations resolved). Iteration 3 delivered complete real-time tracking experience with emergency SOS system, organizer controls, background GPS, and critical Mapbox SDK migration (Story 3.0 as hard blocker). Deferred to backlog: T-3-9 route GeoJSON rendering + route adherence chip (candidate for iter-4). Next iteration (iter-4) depends on: (1) PR #15 human merge, (2) post-merge CocoaPods CI cache update (DevOps), (3) deep link domain provisioning (hard blocker for iter-1), (4) GoRouter DI assessment.
